sentences.text: First thing, I went in the morning to work.
That is why I remember the day, [NON-ENGLISH], a force [INAUDIBLE], [NON-ENGLISH].
I went to work.
I went to the field.
The people was working already over there.
I say to people, stop the working.
So you know, it's for Hitler.
Till October the 10th, must be killed out all people, all Jewish people, from the-- here, in Ukraine.
October the 10th, '42.
That was [NON-ENGLISH].
Then everyone's start to ask over.
I told them, I don't know so much.
I know this-- this is going to be.
So you know, I said, people, I go away now.
And you-- don't-- where you going?
If somebody ask where to go to hide themselves, that you do what you can.
And I had, already, a place with one man.
The name is-- was-- the first Ukrainian, Andre [NON-ENGLISH], what they named him.
He was knowing I'm a rich man.
And I told him, I give him enough money to live for him and his children.
And he took me.
Next day is [NON-ENGLISH], and-- and-- and [NON-ENGLISH] and [NON-ENGLISH], that he came home.
And he say he was hauling extra [INAUDIBLE] in the place where I was hiding.
What-- to what we say, you know, today they kill in [NON-ENGLISH] and [NON-ENGLISH] all Jewish people.
And you're told where you go find a Jewish man, you go kill the whole family.
And the Jewish [INAUDIBLE], too.
And after that, he came to me in the evening and he say to me, Mendel, Mr.
Steinberg, go where you want.
I'm afraid, he told me.
That's what I told him, it's not helping nothing.
He say, you want the money what you gave it to me?
No.
He gave it to me, the money what I gave it to him.
And I started to go from place to place, to all the best Ukrainian-- to all [INAUDIBLE] what has [INAUDIBLE].
Nobody will even-- they won't listen to me.
Till I came at the one place, Ukrainian, the name is [NON-ENGLISH].
He had five boys.
I was known to all five boys.
He was called [NON-ENGLISH], did for himself-- went looking for Jewish people to kill, to kill them.
You know, I was with them goy, very good.
And I saw-- and I told them the same.
I say, [NON-ENGLISH], I am [NON-ENGLISH] now.
You want-- you want, you can hiding me and my wife.
Then I said, you know, I pay you so much.
You won't have to work, and your family.
And if you want, of course if you want, you can kill me.
Nobody will kill me, we wouldn't have nothing.
Now, one thing I can tell you, mine all four brothers, they are near here, hiding.
And I put on by rich people, now, should even taking on too-- too-- I-- on-- other people do and he go doing that.
So you know, Ian, I told him, I'm going to you.
Why I told him this, should-- it was-- it was not true.
No, should he think and know yet, I don't-- you not killing me.
And he say oh-- and he say, I'm going to tell my-- my wife, ask-- ask what she say.
He went to his wife in the house.
And he was over there, keep talking, talking, till about 20 minutes after he came out.
He say, you know, [NON-ENGLISH], my wife told me, she say, a good Jew like you, we must save.
And that's how I was by this place 18 months total.
But everything-- I was over there that's not go taking one evening.
After a whole week even, I didn't finish it.
I have enough to us still-- still-- it's already 18 months.
You see, I told him, I am hiding at one place.
Now, you know I say-- people was knowing I'm rich.
I say, you know, now, it happened like this.
This man took seven people more.
And I am afraid of with everyone.
It's-- it's so much people.
I am afraid to be over there.
Then I want go away.
Then I came to you.
I know you're my friend too.
And you try to save me.
And he did it.
Sure.
See, I came to warn-- to warn-- to more than one man in [NON-ENGLISH].
The name was [NON-ENGLISH].
I still remember the name.
And I told him of this.
Then she-- you have our old mother.
Then she came down and she's starting to cry, and [INAUDIBLE] when do you go, OK, Mendel, no.
I go hiding but [?
Mira ?] from-- even she was up in-- she and you will be [INAUDIBLE] like house, is when she was on the top, you know, it's brick, you know?
I go I am by-- I go, I am but she's going with me.
Then she says, mama, he don't want for himself.
He want bring in [NON-ENGLISH], too, it was boy, they used to call him, this name.
And his wife too.
Oh, you're [INAUDIBLE], no.
Then I left and I go on till I find a place where they was-- See, I-- 90%-- more than 90% everyone here was save himself.
They went away, they left the wife and the children, and they went away for himself.
Now anyway, nobody for them became alive.
Everyone was killed.
They-- No, I was lucky and God was with me.
And I was safe for this place.
No, I was already known what is-- what he was-- what he did to me, the-- the first Ukrainian.
I make up a story.
I came to him one time, I say, you know, [NON-ENGLISH], what's happened?
He was knowing.
That was mine-- my wife's grandfather.
And old man, 93 years old.
He was the first one what Hitler kill him.
He was dead.
That's my first wife's grandfather.
He was a builder.
He was working for-- for-- for the-- well, for the [INAUDIBLE], too.
He was known very good too.
He came in dream.
And he saw-- told Schendel-- that's the name for my wife-- so you know, from this place, you never go away.
This place is your local place.
And this place, you became alive.
You-- you're going to be alive.
And you know, the people, what they-- what they hiding you, to him-- today these people is nothing never happened to.
And the goy that were [INAUDIBLE] was believing me this.

And why I told this, when evil come and chance me away, should, you know, should I have this, you know-- it's-- it's-- well, I know it's a dumb thing, but I was so [INAUDIBLE] me and mine and [INAUDIBLE].
And that was a help, a big, big, help me.
Where we was, by that goy-- by that goy, just two days.
Next door give-- it catch-- Jewish people by-- by-- by the-- they kill them.
Them goy, and the-- and the Jewish people together.
And you say, if you have a friend, you have a friend, go.
And nothing was helping me.
And I left this place.
I went to other goy.
Still looking.
When I left the house, is near-- not far from him's house, is well, a-- a hole.
Around the hole it was wood.
And a small hole was what-- that's there he was hiding potatoes.
And they used to hide them in field, digging holes and keeping potatoes.
Then I took-- it was-- still was filled potatoes there, or things, what from last year.
It was-- they used to eat this where the-- the [INAUDIBLE] were there.
It was dry.
And used to-- as you up above like this, they just dried-- they used to with this, hide in there.
Then I took out the hole.
I put in long-- long pieces, wood.
And I took the-- from the-- from the-- from the potatoes, it-- it-- you call inches-- and put of the-- of the hole, of the top.
And I went to [INAUDIBLE] house and in the barn and took out my wife and children and my son.
And we went over there and met in field.
It was over there.
We nothing took.
I just took mine [INAUDIBLE].
And I took-- we had a little bread, and took.
And we was over there three days.
Till one time, the boss, he went up him's field.
He didn't know nothing.
You know, he saw something.
It's not like-- like it was before.
But they-- they came over there and he saw this.
And he took our son, took out there, then says, [NON-ENGLISH]?
I say, you know what's happened.
You didn't hear?
[NON-ENGLISH].
What's happened?
See, I say-- I went to-- I told him.
I go, but it's not-- not true.
I-- I-- start-- I told him I started, you know, for a minute.
I said-- and he was-- he was won't take me.
And I have came here, taken my wife.
And then she starting cry-- crying and hollering.
And she won't go.
She won't even go for herself.
You go.
And I'm not going from you.
Then I went for myself.
And I-- I asked him-- when that was a barn-- you know, he was over there in a barn.
And in the morning I came, before-- before it got light.
And oh, he say, he was here-- and they-- they-- them-- their dog barking then they noticed I came.
And this place, he told-- he went home, he told his wife what's happened, where we are.
Then she says-- she started crying.
And she said, you know, we have to do something with them.
And then they was taken over by him in the barn.
They make a hole in barn.
And over there, I arrive in barn, and by the side, it was a hole, what we was to go in the barn, in-- in the hole.
And we was in barn till they start to-- Polish people was branding and killing the Ukrainian.
And the Ukrainian used to kill them.
It was between them, a revolution.
Ocean
One time he came and he said, Mr.
Steinberg, instead of hiding didn't know you were save you.
You know, now is another thing.
What's going on?
She's right in the hole-- one [INAUDIBLE].
I say, You see, Mr.
[NON-ENGLISH], with me it's going to be a-- it must be a miracle, I say.
You know-- you know my-- mine grandfather, he was a religion man.
And he-- and he-- my wife had such a dream.
And only thing I say, now she's very, very, very sick, my my wife.
I could not [INAUDIBLE] it there.
Wait till she get a little stronger.
Then every day was guy, coming as asking, you know, has she not died yet?
She not died yet?
You know, he was-- I say, no, no, no.
Till one time, I was outside.
You know, he saw me, [INAUDIBLE] boy, came and he was talking, my-- with him, how it is.
Say you know one thing we have to do.
He say, she's sick.
Let you go for himself.
And take in boy too.

Then we will kill you and then we-- And I told him-- I told him this-- when-- when he came and he told-- and I was hearing what he say, we will kill you, then I came in the hole and I told my wife, you know, something going here, very bad.
And I told her the story.
You know, I said, I go waiting what is going to be, if he will come.
It's-- he came.
And he say, [NON-ENGLISH].
You know?
You take his boy.
And let she be.
When she dies-- then I-- I told him, should you come-- and I say, now come at nighttime with people and we go bury her.
Like, OK, very good.
What you doing now?
I went from my-- from one place.
And then I went-- to-- to another place.
And it was only myself.
And then I came back.
And he was-- knows-- he know when I'm gone.
The-- the-- the dog was at the barn.
And he knows I-- I went and came back.
And he say, what-- you know, what-- why you still here?
I start to cry and say, you know, she didn't want to [INAUDIBLE] me.
She say no, the struggle became she didn't want to give me mine.
And I said to her OK, I go giving my boy, [INAUDIBLE], and I for myself, I have a place where to go alive.
[NON-ENGLISH], you know, it was-- he did know how he was-- he didn't-- was thinking I am so-- I am not smart.
God gave to me a gift to [NON-ENGLISH], you know.
I have a brother, he say, he is smart.
That's why he did it.
No.
I said, I thought, I am a different man.
I can only-- see, God give to me to me good meshuggahs, good [NON-ENGLISH], you know, a good mind.
And [INAUDIBLE] tell-- to tell the story till the end is not one night.
That's taking me weeks.
What?
That time it was-- it happened like this.
He had told me, OK, he say, so you know, you take your risk.
Dear God, he-- he-- I-- I-- my thing-- one thing, he told him-- I told him, you should bring me a little water.
You know, boy is crying.
I need water.
He say he go put in over there for him and I had to go-- and I'll go over there, and I'll place.
And should I, nighttime, went over there and taken the-- the water.
I went and it became dark.
I went up the [INAUDIBLE] and I start looking all over.
I didn't see nobody.
I run away, the street over there, of the place where the water was.
And when I just run over the street, two boys, they saw me.
And they came to me.
And they say to me, are you still alive?
And they was kill me.
I fall down and they was thinking I'm already dead.
I don't know how long I was over there, on the ground.
I don't know.
Till it come and I start to think of where I am.
Still was nighttime.
And I took myself and went over there, the field with maize.
With-- they was well over the eye, the-- you know, the green corn, you know.
And I run in the fields and I came home.
My wife and my son was thinking I'm killed already.
You know, [INAUDIBLE] came and saw some [INAUDIBLE].
They was thinking, OK, more, I am now gone.
In the morning, came the courier.
And he ask-- open the door, and he ask, [NON-ENGLISH]?
[NON-ENGLISH]?
They didn't call the [INAUDIBLE].
Well, she's-- I'm-- I'm killed already.
No, it's called here, a famous name.
Then my wife say to him, Mendel.
Well, the Ukrainians knew.
When you saw me in the-- in the [INAUDIBLE], he cursed himself.
Said, you-- are you killed?
Why-- why you alive?
And his son told a story, what's happened.
Came to him, [INAUDIBLE], the two guys.
And they told him they catch me [INAUDIBLE] in the field, and they killed me.
And after the killing, they went to [NON-ENGLISH], to the chief.
And they told they killed me.
Then what I will have done, why they kill me?
Why they didn't brought my alive?
When you take me alive, you know, when I am here not self, by self.
There's more Jewish people here.
And he told him again now, only thing, when they went for-- you saw me-- I am not-- somebody was shooting with-- with-- you know, someone was shooting.
That is-- that is-- your-- why I didn't tell him there's more Jewish people here.
I say, [NON-ENGLISH].
Here is nobody but me.
And as I cry and I see, and they told me this story.
And I say, OK, you see for yourself.
You see me.
You see me two eyes.
Just because you was thinking I'm killed.
And nobody Jewish people here.
Nobody's here.
So anyways, say to me, they-- they going to catch you.
And so you know, I'm not coming anymore after you.
And he told goodbye.
And then he came.
Why?
The next day, the Polish people was killing him.
Then she came to me next day, up in the field.
They told me, do you know, Mr.
Steinberg, you killed mine husband.
Nobody care about that you know, that I was still, I really didn't have place.
I decided anywhere I'm going to get killed.

How much I can keep and to-- to-- [INAUDIBLE] to dead that to-- you know, to lying him and then tell-- tell, maybe, would go after every time-- every minute, coming to see however many we got-- we get now.
They told us the front is already near.
The Russians were already near.
And I was over there till the end.
In this particular place, the last place, I was 18 month.
No, of this place I was nine months.
Yeah, it was-- I was-- it was a hole in middle the field.
In the time when I was digging this, I was digging this place-- with [INAUDIBLE] permission.
He told me, out there in the field you can do everything.
Of this place I dig another hold, digging out not two week.
But I know I-- I can't make enough-- digging out a hole in-- in one evening.
I dig up the space small.
And over the top, on the ground, I put long wood.
And I think with I being in the ground, I-- every day I was digging.
And I was making so-- so big the-- the ground, I have a hole in the ground.
But I put over there 40 piece potatoes.
I went in the field for more potatoes, potatoes and onions.
These two things we was eating.
In the hole.
See, I want-- the-- the-- the-- the Polish people were running the-- the Ukrainians continued going is of the place where they [INAUDIBLE].
But I-- I find over there a pail-- pail, pots and pan.
I bought four pots and pans and a pail.
And a pail what they used to kept milk, in the-- the farmers, in the-- in there, milk for-- and this, we used to make in, in nighttime, when it was dark.
Not when-- not it was not snowing.
When it was snowing, then goes in the-- the-- the snow.
No, when-- when you still stand to snowing, that time, I used to take up everything, all the garbage from this.
And I used to take old-- old pans, pots and pans, with water, should I have water in-- I was in the hole.
The potatoes, I had, like I say, I had four jars-- four big-- like, what were-- what-- yeah, to cook in.
And I used to two-- with two holes.
I just took cook them up [INAUDIBLE] two jar of potatoes.
And I add already, the water, putting it in the under tap and putting-- again, to cook the onions.
And I used to make in 40-- like, four plates potatoes in one evening.
And the potatoes, I used to keep them two weeks, till they used to go off and then like-- like, water, like, you know-- in the end way was eating them.
That's how I was eating.
When the war was coming to end?
One time it was over a couple of weeks and no snowing.
No snow.
They had afraid and never [INAUDIBLE] was no snow.
Once it started snowing-- started snowing.
I had to look, it's snowing.
When the snow started to fall bigger, I took everything out and I say to-- I came to the hole and I say to my wife, you know Schendel, something's going on here.
It's not far, the-- the-- over there, the-- the-- the old-- main road, what's going.
It's something going on.
Either the German running away, either the Russian coming in.
Something is going on.
I said, maybe I take little bit to go near.
Maybe I go here and what they talking, he was talking.
I was here and I hear there's talk.
You know, I can understand if it's-- if it's Ukrainian, if it's Polish.
She say, no, don't go.
Then all night, that time, I didn't sleep.
Just keeping the [INAUDIBLE] night and to look.
Till the morning, sun already like the morning, I saw, it's two horse with people.
And they are-- they are riding a pair of horses, two people.
OK.
